items.name: Ancient Breathing Mask
items.description: Breathe the air of the ancients.

items.name: Hockey Mask
items.description: Hmm. Doesn't look friendly, does he?

items.name: Black Paintball Mask
items.description: Paintball is like baseball, only for the 21st century.

items.name: Heat Vision Goggles
items.description: Gives "death stare" a new meaning.

items.name: Yellow Safety Goggles
items.description: Cause your friends don't science, and if they don't science, they're no friends of mine.

items.name: Blue Dirt Bike Goggles
items.description: Enjoy them now, because after your first ride, they're going to be brown.

items.name: Blackvalk Shades
items.description: For when you're ridin'... but it's dark.

items.name: Sequined Boxing Mask - KSI
items.description: Channel your inner boxing champion with this sequined boxing mask!

items.name: Camo Goggles
items.description: So no one will ever see the whites of your eyes....

items.name: Night Vision Goggles
items.description: Stolen from Gamer3D's lab by covert operatives who wish to use them for purposes unknown.

items.name: Muddy Mask
items.description: It's a dirty job, but somebody has to do it.

items.name: Midnight Jester Mask
items.description: I'm laughing.  Are you?

items.name: Nullification Cyborg Goggles
items.description: Nullifies enemies with mini red missiles that are launched by thoughts.

items.name: Inventor Goggles
items.description: He blinded me with science.

items.name: Purple Crazy Glasses
items.description: Je suis fou!

items.name: Profit Vision Goggles
items.description: I see profit in that trade!  This item came out of the High Frequency Trading Gift on December 21st, 2012.

items.name: Laser Spec Ops Goggles
items.description: When you're defending freedom, nothing less will do.

items.name: Magnaspectro Inspectors
items.description: Spectacles for inspecting all things big and small.

items.name: True Vision Night Goggles
items.description: When you want to know the truth... make it true vision.

items.name: Lime Glasses
items.description: Express your unique style with these fun, translucent lime frames from American Girl.

items.name: Cursed Mask of Quetzalcoatl
items.description: When exiled from his home Quetzalcoatl left a raft of snakes and promised to return some day. Do you dare to wear his cursed mask?

items.name: Laser Spec Special Forces Goggles
items.description: Sometimes you have to go beyond top secret.

items.name: Vans x The North Face Goggles
items.description: The limited edition Vans x The North Face Goggles. Brave the elements, grab your board and hit the park with these collectable goggles.

items.name: Frost Vision Goggles
items.description: Renders snow storms meaningless.

items.name: Green 8-Bit Snowboard Goggles
items.description: Protect your vision on the pixelated slopes.

items.name: Neon Party Mask
items.description: You light up the room... literally!

items.name: Gross Goggles
items.description: Uh...excuse me sir....your eye...it ...uh... fell out?

items.name: Supa Fly Goggles
items.description: You'll look supa fly in these awesome yellow goggles!

items.name: Radical Future Goggles
items.description: The future is radical.  Just like the past.

items.name: Blue Chrome Glasses
items.description: Because you're liable to bump into someone when you wear these... so make sure you look sharp.
